.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(238, 238, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(56, 132, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(56, 132, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(238, 238, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(99, 99, 99, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(238, 238, 238) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(238, 238, 238), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(238, 238, 238) 65%, transparent))
body.--font-monospace: '??', "Consolas", monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body.background: rgb(238, 238, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(238, 238, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.font-family: "??", Consolas, monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(213, 57, 132, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(84, 93, 204, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(224, 172, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(99, 99, 99, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 191, 188, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(238, 238, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(56, 132, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(238, 238, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(56, 132, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(238, 238, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: "??", Consolas, monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

mark.background: rgba(56, 132, 255, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(245, 247, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", Consolas, monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace
